hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); CONTENT=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.content // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q 'console\.log'; then echo 'Warning: console.log statements should be removed before committing' >&2; exit 2; fi

hooks.description: Run npm audit when package.json changes
hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" == "package.json" ]]; then echo 'Checking for vulnerable dependencies...'; npm audit --audit-level=moderate; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx|json|css|scss)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi

hooks.description: Final type check and lint on changed files
hooks.command: if [[ -f package.json ]]; then CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$'); if [[ -n "$CHANGED" ]]; then TSC_OUT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); TSC_EXIT=$?; if [[ $TSC_EXIT -ne 0 ]]; then echo "[tsc] Type errors found:" >&2; echo "$TSC_OUT" >&2; exit 1; fi; ESLINT_OUT=$(echo "$CHANGED" | xargs npx eslint 2>&1); ESLINT_EXIT=$?; if [[ $ESLINT_EXIT -ne 0 ]]; then echo "[eslint] Lint errors found:" >&2; echo "$ESLINT_OUT" >&2; exit 1; fi; fi; fi

hooks.description: Run tests for changed source files
hooks.command: if [[ -f package.json ]]; then CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$' | grep -vE '\.(test|spec)\.'); if [[ -n "$CHANGED" ]]; then if [[ -f node_modules/.bin/vitest ]]; then TEST_OUT=$(npx vitest run --passWithNoTests 2>&1); TEST_EXIT=$?; elif [[ -f node_modules/.bin/jest ]]; then TEST_OUT=$(npx jest --passWithNoTests 2>&1); TEST_EXIT=$?; else TEST_EXIT=0; fi; if [[ $TEST_EXIT -ne 0 ]]; then echo "[vitest] Tests failed:" >&2; echo "$TEST_OUT" >&2; exit 1; fi; fi; fi

if [[ -f package.json ]] && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$'; then if command -v bundlesize >/dev/null 2>&1; then BUNDLE_OUT=$(npx bundlesize 2>&1); BUNDLE_EXIT=$?; if [[ $BUNDLE_EXIT -ne 0 ]]; then echo "[bundlesize] Bundle limit exceeded:" >&2; echo "$BUNDLE_OUT" >&2; exit 1; fi; fi; fi
